description_long: This is a medium-sized, hexagonal-shaped woven handbag with a distinctive green and off-white checkered pattern. The body of the bag is crafted from interlaced plant fibers, giving it a textured, artisanal appearance. It features a single, sturdy handle made from the same woven material, attached at the top center. The closure is a loop-and-knot mechanism, also constructed from the same fibers, providing a secure yet decorative finish. The bag's sides taper inward toward the base, creating a spacious interior suitable for carrying personal items. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, making it suitable for urban use or casual outings.
description: A green and off-white woven handbag with a hexagonal shape, single handle, and loop-and-knot closure. The checkered pattern and artisanal weave give it a unique, textured look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full hexagonal shape, checkered pattern, single handle, and loop-and-knot closure at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's narrow profile, inward-tapered sides, and the thickness of the woven material.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the checkered pattern and handle, but closure details are less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the bag's slim profile and the woven texture.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached at the top center with woven integration.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Loop-and-knot closure at the top center, made from the same woven material as the bag.
attribute_pattern: Green and off-white checkered geometric pattern created by the woven fibers.
